hero.label: Private Hamam · Braunschweig
hero.heading: Immerse yourself in a world of stillness
hero.subtext: Exclusive Hamam experience by appointment only

whatIsHamam.heading: What is a Hamam?
whatIsHamam.body1: The Hamam is a traditional Ottoman bathhouse that has served as a place of cleansing, relaxation, and community for centuries.
whatIsHamam.body2: In the warm steam, body and mind are purified – a holistic ritual that brings well-being and inner peace.
whatIsHamam.body3: At Hamam Braunschweig, you experience this ancient tradition in a private, exclusive setting – carefully and lovingly crafted.

card1.name: Hamam Ritual
card1.description: Full steam ceremony with full-body scrub, foam massage, and deep relaxation.

card2.name: Finnish Sauna
card2.description: Traditional sauna experience for detoxification and full-body relaxation.

card3.name: Beauty Treatments
card3.description: Professional beauty and skincare treatments for radiant, glowing skin.

openingHours.heading: Opening Hours
openingHours.appointmentNote: All appointments by reservation only. Call us or book online.

meetYourHost.heading: Meet Your Host
meetYourHost.name: Saliha-Nur Erden
meetYourHost.title: Master Wellness Masseuse & Beautician
meetYourHost.bio: My wish is for every guest to discover the lasting benefits of the Hamam experience. I recommend a treatment every 3–4 weeks.
meetYourHost.bio2: With years of experience in Ottoman bathing culture and modern wellness treatments, I create an individual, unforgettable experience for every guest.

services.heading: Our Treatments
services.subheading: Exclusive wellness experiences for body and soul

hamam.name: Hamam Ritual
hamam.description: The complete Ottoman bathing ritual: steam bath, full-body scrub on the warm navel stone, luxurious foam massage, and deep relaxation.

hamamKosmetik.name: Hamam + Beauty
hamamKosmetik.description: A combination of the classic Hamam ritual and professional beauty treatment for a comprehensive wellness experience.

sauna.name: Finnish Sauna
sauna.description: Traditional Finnish sauna experience for detoxification, improved circulation, and deep mental relaxation.

peeling.name: Full Body Scrub
peeling.description: Intensive full-body exfoliation with a traditional kese glove – for silky smooth, radiant skin.

schaum.name: Foam Massage
schaum.description: Indulgent full-body massage with rich, fragrant soap foam – relaxing and invigorating in equal measure.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.subheading: We look forward to hearing from you
